title: Best of Crime Patrol
subTitle: Twenty-one-year-old Shyama gets married to a much older Ritesh. Ritesh already has a daughter, Nimmi who dislikes Shyama and misbehaves with her. Things take a turn for the worse when Nimmi goes missing and Shyama is found dead in her own home.
